---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: Endo -STAR
acronym: ''
description: Reporting of future clinical trials for infrainguinal endovascular treatments
  of peripheral arterial disease.
doi: 10.1093/bjs/znaf020
pmid-id: '[40241414](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40241414/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40241414/
relevant-urls: |-
  [Read the full text](https://academic.oup.com/bjs/article/112/4/znaf020/8114921#supplementary-data) of Endo-STAR.

  The Endo-STAR checklists can be found on the [project website](https://endo-star.com/).
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Zywicka EM, Moore AJ, Twine C, Behrendt CA, Bosiers
  M, Brodmann M, Choke E, deBorst GJ, Diamantopoulos A, Enzmann F, Farber A, Ansel
  G, Gattuso D, Goh GS, Yann G, Jansen S, Landini M, Lejay A, Lichtenberg M, Menard
  M, Mezes P, Mills J, Nixon J, Nordanstig J, O''Connell K, Ozdemir B, Patrone L,
  Puppala S, Saratzis A, Secemsky EA, Sigrid N, Stavroulakis K, Steiner S, Teraa M,
  Van Herzeele I, Venermo M, Zeller T, Mouton R, Hinchliffe RJ. Endovascular treatment
  of peripheral arterial disease: Endo-STAR framework for the design, conduct, and
  reporting of trials. Br J Surg. 2025; 112: 4.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
- Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
- Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
# - Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
- Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
- Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
# - Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- No keywords provided

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
